name: Operators
description: Graphical operators transform your dataset and specify a layout.

spread.description: The spread operator is used to spread the data across the x or y axis.

stack.description: The stack operator is used to stack the data across the x or y axis.

scatter.description: The scatter operator is used to scatter the data across the x or y axis.

group.description: The group operator is used to group the data by a given key.

derive.description: The derive operator is used to derive a new column from the data.
